close_reason: Added [buck2] isolation_dir = .turnkey to generated buckconfig in nix/devenv/turnkey/buck2.nix
description:
Configure Buck2 to use .turnkey as the default isolation directory instead of v2.

This hides build artifacts under buck-out/.turnkey/ which Go, Cargo, and other tools ignore (directories starting with . are skipped during recursive operations like './...').

Implementation:
- Modify nix/devenv/turnkey/buck2.nix to add [buck2] section with isolation_dir = .turnkey
- The buckconfig is generated, so this is a Nix code change, not editing a static file
- Document the change and rationale
- Note: First build after change will have cache miss (one-time cost)

Location: nix/devenv/turnkey/buck2.nix around line 271 (buckconfigContent)
title: Set default isolation_dir to .turnkey in .buckconfig
